mapper.insert: INSERT INTO points_request(type, user_id, points, remark, voucher_images, status, auditor_id, audit_remark, audit_time, before_points, after_points, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES (#{type}, #{userId}, #{points}, #{remark}, #{voucherImages}, #{status}, #{auditorId}, #{auditRemark}, #{auditTime}, #{beforePoints}, #{afterPoints}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM points_request WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE points_request SET status = #{status}, auditor_id = #{auditorId}, audit_remark = #{auditRemark}, audit_time = #{auditTime}, before_points = #{beforePoints}, after_points = #{afterPoints}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PENDING' AND deleted = 0
